name: Poached Salmon with Cucumber-Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cucumber into chunks and finely mince in a food processor.
2. Add sour cream, mayonnaise, salt, dill, and lemon juice to the minced cucumber; puree until smooth.
3. In a saucepan or skillet that can hold salmon in a single layer, place an equal amount of water and wine (or use all water if using less wine). Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Add salmon fillets to the boiling liquid and reduce heat. Simmer for 5 minutes for half-inch thick fillets. Test one fillet to ensure it is cooked through.
5. Remove salmon from the liquid and drain briefly on paper towels. Place on dinner plates and spoon a ribbon of sauce over the salmon.
